name: com.zacharysnewman.inventory
description: A flexible and configurable inventory system for Unity supporting typed containers (Bomb Bag, Quiver, Wallet, etc.), stackable items, multiple currency types, and currency-gated purchases.

samples.description: Bomb Bags, Quivers, and Wallets in three sizes each; sword and bow equipment slots; collectible heart containers; potion bottles; rupee-gated shop purchases; and bomb-bag upgrade with item transfer.
Primary, secondary, and tertiary weapon slots (tertiary gated behind a Large Backpack pickup); lethal and tactical equipment slots; armor plate storage; and cash-based buy-station purchases.
